---
id: get-devices
title: "查询设备信息列表"
description: "获取指定空间下的设备列表，支持分页和过滤条件。"
sidebar_label: "查询设备信息列表"
hide_title: true
hide_table_of_contents: true
api: 
sidebar_class_name: "get api-method"
info_path: i18n/zh/docusaurus-plugin-content-docs/version-Beta/aqara-api/data-export-api/data-export-api
custom_edit_url: null
---

import MethodEndpoint from "@theme/ApiExplorer/MethodEndpoint";
import ParamsDetails from "@theme/ParamsDetails";
import RequestSchema from "@theme/RequestSchema";
import StatusCodes from "@theme/StatusCodes";
import OperationTabs from "@theme/OperationTabs";
import TabItem from "@theme/TabItem";
import Heading from "@theme/Heading";

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"查询设备信息列表"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"get"}
  path={"/devices"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



获取指定空间下的设备列表，支持分页和过滤条件。

<Heading
  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
  className={"openapi-tabs__heading"}
  children={"Request"}
>
</Heading>

<ParamsDetails
  parameters={[{"name":"spaceIds","in":"query","description":"空间 ID 列表。示例：spaceIds=xx1,xx2 或 spaceIds=xx1&spaceIds=xx2。为空查询所有设备","required":false,"schema":{"type":"array","items":{"type":"string"}},"style":"form","explode":true},{"name":"needChildren","in":"query","description":"是否需要查询子空间下的设备。仅当 spaceIds 不为空时，本参数才有用","required":false,"schema":{"type":"boolean","default":false}},{"name":"spaceAssociated","in":"query","description":"是否查询 spaceIds 指定空间下的设备。<ul><li>true：仅查询指定空间下的设备；</li><li>false：仅查询非指定空间下的设备（此时 spaceIds 和 needChildren 参数无效）；</li><li>不填：<ul><li>当 spaceIds 为空时，默认查询所有设备；</li><li>当 spaceIds 不为空时，默认查询指定空间下的设备。</li></ul></li></ul>","required":false,"schema":{"type":"boolean","nullable":true}},{"name":"state","in":"query","description":"设备在线状态。<ul><li>true：查询在线设备。</li><li>false：查询离线设备。</li><li>不填：不筛选。</li></ul>","required":false,"schema":{"type":"boolean","nullable":true}},{"name":"deviceTypesList","in":"query","description":"设备类型列表。示例：deviceTypesList=light,switch 或 deviceTypesList=light&deviceTypesList=switch","required":false,"schema":{"type":"array","items":{"type":"string"}},"style":"form","explode":true},{"name":"orderBy","in":"query","description":"排序方式。<ul><li>createTime asc：按创建时间升序排序。</li><li>createTime desc：按创建时间降序排序。</li></ul>","required":false,"schema":{"type":"string","default":"createTime asc","enum":["createTime asc","createTime desc"]},"example":"createTime asc"},{"name":"pageNum","in":"query","description":"页码","required":false,"schema":{"type":"integer"},"example":1},{"name":"pageSize","in":"query","description":"每页数量","required":false,"schema":{"type":"integer"},"example":200}]}
>
  
</ParamsDetails>

<RequestSchema
  title={"Body"}
  body={undefined}
>
  
</RequestSchema>

<StatusCodes
  id={undefined}
  label={undefined}
  responses={{"200":{"description":"请求发起成功","content":{"application/json":{"schema":{"allOf":[{"type":"object","required":["type","version","msgId","code"],"properties":{"type":{"type":"string","description":"消息类型"},"version":{"type":"string","description":"接口版本","example":"v1"},"msgId":{"type":"string","description":"消息 ID"},"code":{"type":"integer","description":"业务状态码，0 表示成功"},"message":{"type":"string","description":"提示信息"}},"title":"BaseResponse"},{"type":"object","properties":{"data":{"type":"object","required":["totalCount","pageNum","pageSize","data"],"properties":{"totalCount":{"type":"integer","description":"满足条件的设备总数","example":3},"pageNum":{"type":"integer","description":"当前页码","example":1},"pageSize":{"type":"integer","description":"当前页大小","example":200},"data":{"type":"array","description":"当前页设备列表","items":{"type":"object","required":["deviceId","deviceName","deviceTypesList","createTime","state"],"properties":{"deviceId":{"type":"string","description":"设备 ID"},"deviceName":{"type":"string","description":"设备名称"},"deviceTypesList":{"type":"array","items":{"type":"string"},"description":"设备类型列表"},"createTime":{"type":"integer","format":"int64","description":"创建时间（毫秒级 UTC 时间戳）"},"state":{"type":"boolean","description":"设备在线状态"},"space":{"type":"object","required":["parentSpaceId","spaceId","name"],"properties":{"parentSpaceId":{"type":"string","description":"父空间 ID"},"spaceId":{"type":"string","description":"空间 ID"},"name":{"type":"string","description":"空间名称"}},"title":"DeviceSpace"}},"title":"DeviceInfo"}}},"title":"DeviceListData"}}}],"example":{"type":"GetDeviceInfoResponse","version":"v1","msgId":"a1b2c3d4-e5f6-7890-abcd-000000000007","code":0,"message":"success","data":{"totalCount":3,"pageNum":1,"pageSize":200,"data":[{"deviceId":"device-001","deviceName":"客厅灯","deviceTypesList":["light"],"createTime":1710001234567,"state":true,"space":{"parentSpaceId":"space-home-001","spaceId":"space-room-001","name":"客厅"}}]}},"title":"DevicesResponse"},"examples":{"devicesPage":{"value":{"type":"GetDeviceInfoResponse","version":"v1","msgId":"1751609244328","code":0,"message":"success","data":{"totalCount":3,"pageNum":1,"pageSize":200,"data":[{"deviceId":"device-001","deviceName":"客厅灯","deviceTypesList":["light"],"createTime":1710001234567,"state":true,"space":{"parentSpaceId":"space-home-001","spaceId":"space-room-001","name":"客厅"}}]}}}}}}},"400":{"description":"请求参数错误","content":{"application/json":{"schema":{"example":{"type":"ErrorMessage","version":"v1","msgId":"a1b2c3d4-e5f6-7890-abcd-err000000001","code":400,"message":"参数
